disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing chronic hepatitis C with known cirrhosis (scarred liver) for about 20 years
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any long-term health conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had hepatitis C for about 20 years and they've told me my liver is scarred — cirrhosis.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, severe, continuous tearing right-upper-quadrant pain over 24 hours, escalating to agonising
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and what does it feel like?
When did the pain start and how bad is it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep tearing pain under my right ribs that started yesterday and has got agonising tonight — nothing shifts it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly worsening abdominal distension over 24 hours on a background of pre-existing ascites, with breathlessness and inability to lie flat
trigger_question_examples: Has your tummy swelling changed recently?
Are you short of breath, and can you lie flat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My belly has blown up like a balloon since yesterday and I can't lie flat — I get breathless, so I'm stuck sitting upright.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New yellowing of the eyes and skin (jaundice) noticed by the patient
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of your eyes or skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my eyes and skin have gone yellow, which is new.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Four months of significant unintentional weight loss, profound loss of appetite and severe fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost weight without trying?
How have your appetite and energy been over the last few months?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a lot of weight over the last few months without trying, I've got no appetite, and I'm exhausted all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sensation of the heart racing and feeling weak (patient-perceived tachycardia / early circulatory compromise)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel your heart racing or feel faint?
Do you feel weak or lightheaded?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart feels like it's racing and I feel weak, though I haven't actually passed out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Existing diuretics (water tablets) taken this morning with negligible effect on the swelling
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any water tablets, and have they helped?
What medications are you on for the fluid?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I take water tablets — spironolactone and frusemide — and I took them this morning but they've made no difference to the swelling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood, no black stools, no loss of consciousness or new confusion at present (pertinent negatives for the escalation watch-list)
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood or passed any black stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't vomited blood or had black stools, and I haven't fainted or been confused — but I feel dreadful.
